introSection: Puss In Boots' Giant Journey is a Zamperla suspended roller coaster located at Universal Studios Singapore in Sentosa, Singapore.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The attraction was officially announced on 29 July 2014, by which time construction was nearly completed. Puss in Boots' Giant Journey was opened on 8 April 2015 following a live show starring Puss in Boots himself.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride begins with a spiral lift (similar that used on Zamperla's Volare flying roller coaster) partially enclosed within a castle turret. It has a custom layout with semi-enclosed cars.

fullText:
Puss In Boots' Giant Journey is a Zamperla suspended roller coaster located at Universal Studios Singapore in Sentosa, Singapore.

The attraction was officially announced on 29 July 2014, by which time construction was nearly completed. Puss in Boots' Giant Journey was opened on 8 April 2015 following a live show starring Puss in Boots himself.

The ride begins with a spiral lift (similar that used on Zamperla's Volare flying roller coaster) partially enclosed within a castle turret. It has a custom layout with semi-enclosed cars.
